data.acceptance:
- Adding a model to the configuration preserves all existing models (configs are merged, not replaced)
- Adding a dispatch configuration preserves all existing dispatch configurations
- The setup CLI displays the current configuration state before prompting for user input
- Modifying a single configuration element (e.g., adding one model) does not affect unrelated configurations (e.g., agents, dispatch rules, other models remain unchanged)
- Users can see what is currently set and make incremental edits without losing prior choices
